points.text: Get vaccinated against COVID-19 to reduce the risk of infection and severity of disease.
Practice good personal hygiene, including regular hand washing and avoiding touching your face.
Maintain physical distancing and wear face masks in public to minimize exposure.
Ensure proper ventilation in indoor spaces to reduce airborne transmission.
Stay home if diagnosed with COVID-19 or if you suspect infection, and follow self-isolation guidelines.
Stay home if you feel ill or have COVID-19 symptoms to prevent spreading the virus.
Maintain good indoor airflow and practice physical distancing to reduce transmission risk.
Wear a mask in appropriate settings to help prevent the spread of COVID-19.
Wash hands frequently with soap and water or use hand sanitizer with at least 60% alcohol.
Cover your coughs and sneezes with a tissue or your elbow, then wash your hands.
Avoid crowded places and maintain physical distancing of at least 1 metre from others.
Wear a mask in public areas where community transmission is present and physical distancing is not possible.
Wash hands frequently with soap and water or an alcohol-based hand rub.
Ensure good ventilation in indoor spaces to reduce virus transmission.
Get vaccinated to help reduce the spread of the virus and its mutations.
